title: Bashan #1316
definition:
Bashan = "fruitful"

 1) a district east of the Jordan known for its fertility which was
    given to the half-tribe of Manasseh
nasbUsage:
Definition: Bashan = "fruitful"

 1) a district east of the Jordan known for its fertility which was
    given to the half-tribe of Manasseh

    NASB:  smooth, a region E. of the Jordan
